title: [10min/16MB] TrigramHash + EMA-SWA + Int4 QAT — val_bpb 1.2219
body:
Submission: TrigramHash + EMA-SWA + Int4 QAT (11 layers)

val_bpb: 1.221853 | total_bytes: 15,892,490 | budget_ok: True

Three orthogonal innovations over the SOTA:
1. TrigramHash(2048, dim=48) — extends BigramHash to 3-token context windows
2. EMA-SWA (α=0.9) — exponential weighting of late-warmdown checkpoints  
3. Int4 QAT on MLP — STE fake-quantization frees budget for an 11th layer

Hardware: 8×A100 SXM 80GB | Seed: 42
